title: Senior TypeScript Engineer
description:
We're seeking an exceptional Senior TypeScript Engineer to join our team in the Netherlands. As a Senior TypeScript Engineer, you will be responsible for developing, maintaining, and extending our microservices platform, handling backend systems, and collaborating on API-driven applications. You will work closely with our engineering team to build scalable, efficient, and reliable software solutions.

**Key Responsibilities:**
* Develop high-quality software solutions using TypeScript, Node.js, and React
* Collaborate with cross-functional teams to design and implement new features
* Troubleshoot and resolve complex technical issues
* Participate in code reviews and contribute to the improvement of the codebase
* Stay up-to-date with the latest technologies and trends in software development

**Requirements:**
* 4+ years of experience in software development with TypeScript, Node.js, and React
* Strong understanding of relational databases and SQL
* Experience with automated testing and Git version control
* Excellent communication and problem-solving skills

**What We Offer:**
* Competitive salary and benefits package
* Opportunity to work with a talented team of engineers
* Flexible working hours and remote work options
* Professional development and growth opportunities
